observations.description: Agent 06 (research) repeatedly reports 'No AI-relevant articles found' with placeholder 'X bookmarks' count, suggesting incomplete implementation or broken bookmark parsing
observations.evidence: {'message':'Agent 06 online. Reading X bookmarks.'} and {'message':'Agent 06 complete. No AI-relevant articles found.'} repeated 5 times in 8 minutes
observations.notes: Agent 06 is running but not surfacing research data—either bookmarks are empty, parser is broken, or filtering is too aggressive

observations.description: Research extraction contains incomplete/failed attempt with raw API error response mixed into insight log
observations.evidence: cyrilXBT tweet entry contains multi-line API error text ('I cannot access external URLs...') instead of structured insight
observations.notes: Indicates Agent 06 is logging failed requests as data—pollutes memory and breaks downstream parsing

observations.description: Agent 03 (income) stub generation in logs shows truncated system prompt—cut off mid-sentence at 'Tradi'
observations.evidence: Agent 03 system prompt ends with '- Tradi' (incomplete word), no closing backtick or router code
observations.notes: Stub was never completed; agent-03-income.js likely missing or non-functional

observations.description: Agent 02 (trader) stub prompt references hardcoded edge context ('CONOR'S EDGE:', watchlist, discord sources) that should be memory-injected, not baked into system prompt
observations.evidence: AGENT_02_SYSTEM contains literal 'CONOR'S TRADING RULES', watchlist names, and trader handles as static strings
observations.notes: Reduces agent adaptability and makes ruleset updates require code changes instead of memory edits

observations.description: Repo root contains 23 loose JSON/log files (action-log.jsonl, discord-history.jsonl, jarvis-log.jsonl, luke-log.jsonl, session.jsonl, shifts.jsonl) scattered instead of organized in logs/ or memory/ directories
observations.evidence: Files like discord-history.jsonl, session.jsonl, shifts.jsonl, luke-log.jsonl at root level instead of subdirectory
observations.notes: Maintainability issue—makes root cluttered and harder to distinguish config from data

observations.description: MEMORY_PATH and SHIFTS_PATH defined in agent-03 stub but no corresponding memory/ directory structure visible in repo listing
observations.evidence: Stub references MEMORY_PATH = '../memory/persistent.json' but no /memory or /agents/memory directory shown in root listing
observations.notes: Potential runtime file-not-found errors when agent-03 tries to read/write memory
